hint: A boring part of something (such as a book or play).
Something that is impossible to defeat or discourage.
To accept it, agree with it, or allow it to happen by staying silent or by not arguing.
Something or someone eccentrically silly or scatterbrained.
A range or series of related things.
Flimsy, weak, or uncertain.
To decorate its surface, usually with a name, slogan, or picture.
In good and often exceptional health.
Nice things that you say or do to convince someone to do something.
People who are glum and grumpy, or things that suggest or express gloom. Also, slow to act or change.
Minor flaws or shortcomings in someone's character or behaviour.
Something that is damaging or harmful, usually in a subtle or unexpected way.
A piece of clothing or equipment that is used in a particular place or for a particular activity. Also, refers to an identifying and often superficial characteristic or device.
To make, form, or repair it with materials that are conveniently on hand.
Something expressing or containing a farewell.
A person who intrudes in a place or sphere of activity; they are not wanted or welcome by the other people present.
Something that has a noticeable smell without specifying the scent. Also, something that causes thoughts or memories of something.
To be the source or cause of something.
The most important part of something (such as a problem, issue, or puzzle).
Something that has a pleasant or agreeable taste, or that is pleasant or acceptable to someone.
Any one of the many different ways or forms in which something exists or can be arranged. Also, a major or fundamental change in something based primarily on rearrangement of its existing elements.
Food that is fatty and oily, especially in a pleasing way. It used to describe someone who is figuratively oily—that is, overly or insincerely flattering.
A group or band of individuals. Also, a group of individuals who have a statistical factor (such as age) in common in a demographic study.
To gain their favour or approval by deliberately doing or saying things they will like.
Someone or something that is kind and generous or something that is organized for the purpose of doing good.
A complicated and difficult problem.
Something too important and respected to be changed or criticized.
A responsibility, obligation, or burden.
To cause it to happen faster.
Something that causes or involves a lot of emotional stress or worry.
A gap or blank space in something—in other words, a missing part. Also, a small cavity, pit, or discontinuity in an anatomical structure.
Someone or something that is politely pleasant and friendly.
Someone's outward manner and behaviour toward others.
To show that they are not guilty.
Someone who is friendly and easy to talk to.
An informal gathering among close friends, especially to share lively gossip or frank conversation.
Something that has many literal or figurative twists and turns.
